response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed for vocal songs. The content was determined to be promotional materials, including voiceover narration/dialogue by various Hololive characters and background instrumental music. No distinct musical tracks with lyrics were identified. Consequently, 'contains_vocal_music' is set to false for all detected segments, and music metadata fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional montage for various Hololive Production projects, including the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026', the 'hololive OFFICIAL FAN CLUB', an official pop-up shop, and the re-release of the 'Holo-End-of-Year/New-Year 2023 Date Voices'. The content consists of animated title cards, promotional graphics, and voiceover dialogue performed by various Hololive talents, accompanied by background instrumental music. No distinct vocal songs were found for lyric analysis.

scenes.description: Title card and intro sequence for 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026'. Features background electronic music.
Promotional segment for 'hololive OFFICIAL FAN CLUB' with voiceover by Mori Calliope and other characters.
Still graphic promotional card for 'hololive production OFFICIAL POP UP SHOP'.

Promotional segment for 're-release Holo-End-of-Year/New-Year 2023 Date Voices', featuring dialogue from AZKi, Mococo Abyssgard, Fuwawa Abyssgard, and Nekomata Okayu, leading into a countdown and New Year's greeting.
